parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gold.plot_hourly_agg (plot_id, device_id, hour_utc,
  avg_soil_moisture, min_soil_moisture, max_soil_moisture,
  avg_soil_temperature, avg_air_temperature, avg_air_humidity, avg_luminosity,
  avg_soil_nitrogen, avg_soil_phosphorus, avg_soil_potassium, avg_ph, avg_conductivity,
  samples_count, computed_at)
SELECT plot_id, device_id, DATE_TRUNC('hour', reading_ts),
  AVG(soil_moisture), MIN(soil_moisture), MAX(soil_moisture),
  AVG(soil_temperature), AVG(air_temperature), AVG(air_humidity), AVG(luminosity),
  AVG(soil_nitrogen), AVG(soil_phosphorus), AVG(soil_potassium), AVG(ph), AVG(conductivity),
  COUNT(*), now()
FROM silver.sensor_readings_clean
WHERE is_outlier = FALSE
  AND plot_id IS NOT NULL
  AND reading_ts >= DATE_TRUNC('hour', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND reading_ts <  DATE_TRUNC('hour', NOW())
GROUP BY plot_id, device_id, DATE_TRUNC('hour', reading_ts)
ON CONFLICT (plot_id, device_id, hour_utc) DO UPDATE SET
  avg_soil_moisture = EXCLUDED.avg_soil_moisture,
  min_soil_moisture = EXCLUDED.min_soil_moisture,
  max_soil_moisture = EXCLUDED.max_soil_moisture,
  avg_soil_temperature = EXCLUDED.avg_soil_temperature,
  avg_air_temperature = EXCLUDED.avg_air_temperature,
  avg_air_humidity = EXCLUDED.avg_air_humidity,
  avg_luminosity = EXCLUDED.avg_luminosity,
  avg_soil_nitrogen = EXCLUDED.avg_soil_nitrogen,
  avg_soil_phosphorus = EXCLUDED.avg_soil_phosphorus,
  avg_soil_potassium = EXCLUDED.avg_soil_potassium,
  avg_ph = EXCLUDED.avg_ph,
  avg_conductivity = EXCLUDED.avg_conductivity,
  samples_count = EXCLUDED.samples_count,
  computed_at = now();

WITH plot_hourly AS (
  SELECT plot_id, hour_utc,
    AVG(avg_soil_moisture) AS avg_soil_moisture,
    AVG(avg_air_temperature) AS avg_air_temperature,
    AVG(avg_air_humidity) AS avg_air_humidity,
    AVG(avg_luminosity) AS avg_luminosity
  FROM gold.plot_hourly_agg
  GROUP BY plot_id, hour_utc
)
INSERT INTO gold.plot_features (plot_id, hour_utc,
  soil_moisture_avg, soil_moisture_lag1h, soil_moisture_lag24h,
  soil_moisture_rolling_mean_6h, soil_moisture_rolling_std_6h,
  air_temperature_avg, air_humidity_avg, luminosity_avg, computed_at)
SELECT plot_id, hour_utc,
  avg_soil_moisture,
  LAG(avg_soil_moisture, 1) OVER w,
  LAG(avg_soil_moisture, 24) OVER w,
  AVG(avg_soil_moisture) OVER (PARTITION BY plot_id ORDER BY hour_utc ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
  STDDEV(avg_soil_moisture) OVER (PARTITION BY plot_id ORDER BY hour_utc ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
  avg_air_temperature, avg_air_humidity, avg_luminosity, now()
FROM plot_hourly
WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY plot_id ORDER BY hour_utc)
ON CONFLICT (plot_id, hour_utc) DO UPDATE SET
  soil_moisture_avg = EXCLUDED.soil_moisture_avg,
  soil_moisture_lag1h = EXCLUDED.soil_moisture_lag1h,
  soil_moisture_lag24h = EXCLUDED.soil_moisture_lag24h,
  soil_moisture_rolling_mean_6h = EXCLUDED.soil_moisture_rolling_mean_6h,
  soil_moisture_rolling_std_6h = EXCLUDED.soil_moisture_rolling_std_6h,
  air_temperature_avg = EXCLUDED.air_temperature_avg,
  air_humidity_avg = EXCLUDED.air_humidity_avg,
  luminosity_avg = EXCLUDED.luminosity_avg,
  computed_at = now();
